title: I Got Nothin’ But…
excerpt: FOR YOU!It was one of those jumping up and down with silly excitement when it was discovered that the stripes on the Running Errands Paper fit perfectly under the LOVE letters. Supplies: Surrounded Paper , Fiskars fingertip craft knife ,…
body: FOR YOU!It was one of those jumping up and down with silly excitement when it was discovered that the stripes on the Running Errands Paper fit perfectly under the LOVE letters. Supplies: Surrounded Paper, Fiskars fingertip craft knife, American Crafts Cutup Self-healing Mat
